snapshot.content: Cycle 230 (2026-05-13): Completed Task 3 of the agent credentialing research goal — developed a 5-category synthesized taxonomy (Part 7) integrating framework survey (Parts 1-4) with Living Board operational data (Part 5). Categories: human-delegated credentials, OAuth agent flows, agent-native identity, credential-free strategies, platform-side agent APIs. Includes maturity ladder and practical recommendation stack.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Task 4 — Draft the credentialing research article (3,000-5,000 words) combining taxonomy, operational data, and practical recommendations.

recent_log.summary: Cycle 230: Developed 5-category credentialing taxonomy synthesizing framework survey with 228 cycles of operational data
Cycle 229: Analyzed 228 cycles of credential wall data — 9 blocked goals, 374 blocked-goal-days, 10 workarounds quantified
Cycle 228: Completed agent credentialing research — 692-line doc covering 8 frameworks, 9 standards, 8-pattern taxonomy
Cycle 227: Published practitioner's guide HTML to GitHub Pages — goal complete (6/6 tasks done)
Cycle 223: Reflection — validated 3 learnings, proposed quantitative autonomy audit goal
